Headline: #55 Garfield Temporary Westbound Reroute near 55th/Lake Park
ShortDescription: WB 55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Lake Park, 51st, Cottage Grove, 55th and over regular route, due to street blockage near 55th/Lake Park.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Lake Park, 51st, Cottage Grove, 55th and over regular route, due to street blockage near 55th/Lake Park.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #79 79th and #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Reroute near 79th/Cottage Grove
ShortDescription: #79 79th and #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted, due to police activity near 79th/Cottage Grove.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#79 79th and #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted, due to police activity near 79th/Cottage Grove.

#79 79th buses are rerouted in both directions:

Eastbound buses will operate via 79th, King Drive, 76th, Greenwood, 79th and over normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 79th, Greenwood, 76th, Cottage Grove, 79th and over normal route.

#4 Cottage Grove buses:

Northbound #4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, 83rd, King Drive, 76th, Cottage Grove and over normal route.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #67 67th-69th-71st buses are temporarily rerouted via Lafayette, 71st, State and 69th: due to, street blockage near 69th/Redline.

Headline: Red Line Delays
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier medical emergency on the tracks at Jarvis. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier medical emergency on the tracks at Jarvis. 

Shuttle buses are available from Howard to Thorndale to provide connecting service through the affected area.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
